Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\).__name__, list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else len\(d\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total cities: {len\(data\)}'\); codes={}; [codes.setdefault\(d['stateCode'],[]\).append\(d['name']\) for d in data]; [print\(f'  {k}: {len\(v\)} cities'\) for k,v in sorted\(codes.items\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total cities: {len\(data\)}'\); codes={}; [codes.setdefault\(d['stateCode'],[]\).append\(d['name']\) for d in data]; [print\(f'  {k}: {len\(v\)} cities'\) for k,v in sorted\(codes.items\(\)\)]; nulls=[d for d in data if d['postalCode'] is None]; print\(f'Entries with null postal: {len\(nulls\)}'\); print\('All stateCodes present:', sorted\(codes.keys\(\)\) == [f'{i:02d}' for i in range\(1,29\)]\)")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec warehouse-sqlserver /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Warehouse@Dev123' -C -d Warehouse -Q "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.ProductPrices")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec warehouse-sqlserver /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Warehouse@Dev123' -C -d Warehouse -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT 'Carriers' AS T, COUNT\(*\) AS N FROM fulfillment.Carriers UNION ALL SELECT 'ServiceLevels', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.CarrierServiceLevels UNION ALL SELECT 'ProductPrices', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.ProductPrices UNION ALL SELECT 'SalesOrders', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.SalesOrders UNION ALL SELECT 'SalesOrderLines', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.SalesOrderLines UNION ALL SELECT 'PickLists', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.PickLists UNION ALL SELECT 'Parcels', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.Parcels UNION ALL SELECT 'Shipments', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.Shipments UNION ALL SELECT 'ShipmentTracking', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.ShipmentTrackingEntries UNION ALL SELECT 'FulfillmentEvents', COUNT\(*\) FROM fulfillment.FulfillmentEvents;" -h -1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec warehouse-sqlserver /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Warehouse@Dev123' -C -d Warehouse -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TOP 10 ProductId, CurrencyCode, UnitPrice, ValidFrom, CreatedByUserId FROM fulfillment.ProductPrices ORDER BY Id DESC; SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT ProductId\) AS DistinctProducts FROM fulfillment.ProductPrices;" -h -1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec warehouse-sqlserver /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Warehouse@Dev123' -C -d Warehouse -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT OrderNumber, Status, CurrencyCode, TotalAmount FROM fulfillment.SalesOrders WHERE OrderNumber LIKE 'SO-SEED%' ORDER BY OrderNumber; SELECT Code, Name FROM fulfillment.Carriers ORDER BY Code;" -h -1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec warehouse-sqlserver /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Warehouse@Dev123' -C -d Warehouse -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT OrderNumber, BillingStreetLine1, BillingCity, BillingCountryCode FROM fulfillment.SalesOrders ORDER BY Id;" -h -1)

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Shipping:', d['shippingStreetLine1'], '/', d['shippingCity']\); print\('Billing: ', d['billingStreetLine1'], '/', d['billingCity'], '/', d.get\('billingCountryName'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['shipment']; print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)")
